name: hkx-rust-build-fix
description: Rust cargo/borrow-checker failure recovery: minimal fix via rust-build-resolver, then Rust + general residual-risk review.

chain.label: Unblock Rust build
chain.task:
Fix Rust build, compilation, borrow-checker, and Cargo dependency errors for:

{task}

Rules:
- Sole writer for the active worktree.
- Minimal diffs only; no architecture or feature changes.
- Prefer local crate evidence (Cargo.toml, rustc diagnostics) over broad rewrites.
- Re-run the failing cargo commands (e.g. cargo check, cargo test, cargo clippy if already used) and report remaining failures.
- Avoid unwrap/expect or discarding Results just to silence the compiler unless tests prove it is correct.

Return root causes, changed files, commands run, and remaining failures.

parallel.label: Rust safety
Minimal-fix review
Silent failures
